description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-stack` (T3-10) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-stack/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, direction (horizontal/vertical) typed, gap typed using design token scale, align/justify typed
2. Accessibility — layout-only component, reading order must match visual order, no ARIA needed unless dividers present, axe-core pass
3. Tests — horizontal/vertical, all gap values, wrapping behavior, alignment, nested stacks, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — vertical/horizontal stacks, all gap sizes, alignment demos
5. CSS — `--hx-*` gap tokens, Flexbox implementation, CSS parts (stack)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (should be smallest in library)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-stack/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-stack — T3-10 antagonistic quality review
